inputs.label: Object Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the object to be pushed up the incline.

inputs.label: Incline Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the inclined plane relative to horizontal.

inputs.label: Friction Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of friction between the object and the surface.

inputs.label: Push Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance the object is pushed along the incline.

inputs.label: Push Time
inputs.businessContext: Time taken to push the object the given distance.

inputs.label: Gravitational Acceleration
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity (standard Earth gravity).

formulas.pushForce: mass * g * (Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180) + mu * Math.cos(angle * Math.PI / 180))
formulas.work: mass * g * (Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180) + mu * Math.cos(angle * Math.PI / 180)) * distance
formulas.power: mass * g * (Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180) + mu * Math.cos(angle * Math.PI / 180)) * distance / time
